homeTagline.zh: 通过 Model Context Protocol 将 Godot 4.6+ 编辑器接入 AI 编码助手
homeTagline.en: Bridge between AI coding assistants and the Godot 4.6+ editor via the Model Context Protocol

featureToolsDesc.zh: 涵盖场景管理、节点操作、脚本编辑、资源控制、项目设置、输入映射等，全面覆盖 Godot 编辑器操作
featureToolsDesc.en: Covering scene management, node operations, script editing, resource control, project settings, input mapping, and more

featurePerfDesc.zh: 基于 C++ GDExtension 实现，零 GC 暂停，纯主线程轮询，无锁无竞争，编辑器零感知延迟
featurePerfDesc.en: Built on C++ GDExtension, zero GC pauses, pure main-thread polling, lock-free and contention-free

featureHttpDesc.zh: 通过 JSON-RPC 2.0 + SSE 提供流式工具调用，支持任意 MCP 客户端（Claude Code、Continue、opencode 等）
featureHttpDesc.en: Streaming tool calls via JSON-RPC 2.0 + SSE, compatible with any MCP client (Claude Code, Continue, opencode, etc.)

featureScriptDesc.zh: 自动语法验证（通过 Godot LSP），创建、编辑、编译 C# 解决方案，完整的脚本生命周期管理
featureScriptDesc.en: Auto syntax validation (via Godot LSP), create/edit/compile C# solutions, full script lifecycle management

featureUndoDesc.zh: 所有编辑器操作集成 Godot 原生撤销系统，每一次修改都可追溯回退
featureUndoDesc.en: All editor operations integrate with Godot's native undo system, every change is reversible

featureCrossDesc.zh: CI/CD 自动构建 Windows / macOS / Linux 三平台 GDExtension 二进制，Tag 即发布
featureCrossDesc.en: CI/CD auto-builds Windows/macOS/Linux GDExtension binaries, tag-and-release
